post.description: Endpoint to sign in with a `vault_token`

201.description: The access token has been successfully created.

get.description: Endpoint to get user details by User ID

201.description: The access token has been successfully created.

get.description: Endpoint to get manager details, including the **Algorand** `public_address` of the **Manager**
Fetch the account asset holdings for a user by their user ID. The response includes the **Algorand** `public_address` of the user and the list of assets held by the user.

200.description: The asset balance has been successfully fetched.

post.description: Create a new **User** in the wallet. The `user_id` is the unique identifier for the user.The response includes the **Algorand** `public_address` of the user.

201.description: A new user has been created.

get.description: Fetch the list of **Users** in the wallet.

201.description: The asset has been successfully created.

post.description: Send an **Algorand** `Asset` from the **Manager** to a **User**.

201.description: The asset has been successfully transferred.

post.description: Send **Algorand** `Algos` to another account. The sender can be either the **Manager** or a **User**.

201.description: The Algos have been successfully transferred.

post.description: Clawback an **Algorand** `Asset` from a **User** to the **Manager**. The `Asset` must have been created with the manager as the clawback address.

201.description: The asset has been successfully clawed back.
The app call has been successfully completed.
The group transaction has been successfully completed.

vault_token.description: A vault token produced by the hashicorp service

access_token.description: A JSON Web Token (JWT) that enables secure access to protected resources. This token includes encoded user information and is signed to ensure integrity.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the User

public_address.description: The public address of the User

algoBalance.description: The balance of Algorand held by the User in microAlgos

public_address.description: The public address of the manager

asset_id.description: The unique identifier of the asset

asset_amount.description: The amount of the asset held by the manager

assets.description: List of assets held by the manager

algoBalance.description: The balance of Algorand held by the manager in microAlgos

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the User

total.description: The total supply of the Asset

decimals.description: The number of decimal places for the Asset

defaultFrozen.description: Indicates if the Asset is frozen by default

unitName.description: The Unit name of the Asset (ie TEST)

assetName.description: The common name of the Asset

managerAddress.description: The public address of the manager

reserveAddress.description: The public address of the reserve

freezeAddress.description: The public address of the freeze

clawbackAddress.description: The public address of the clawback

transaction_id.description: The transaction id of the transfer

assetId.description: The id of the Asset to transfer

userId.description: The id of the User to transfer the Asset to

amount.description: The amount of the Asset to transfer

lease.description: Optional 32-byte base64-encoded lease to prevent replay and conflicting transactions. Use a fixed value to ensure exclusivity. Generate with: Buffer.from(crypto.randomBytes(32)).toString("base64")

note.example: Note to all: notes are public
note.description: Optional public note to attach to transaction

transaction_id.description: The transaction id of the transfer

amount.description: The amount of algos to transfer

fromUserId.description: The id of the User that is transferring Algos

lease.description: Optional 32-byte base64-encoded lease to prevent replay and conflicting transactions. Use a fixed value to ensure exclusivity. Generate with: Buffer.from(crypto.randomBytes(32)).toString("base64")

note.example: Note to all: notes are public
note.description: Optional public note to attach to transaction

transaction_id.description: The transaction id of the transfer

assetId.description: The id of the Asset to clawback

userId.description: The id of the User to clawback the Asset from

amount.description: The amount of the Asset to transfer

lease.description: Optional 32-byte base64-encoded lease to prevent replay and conflicting transactions. Use a fixed value to ensure exclusivity. Generate with: Buffer.from(crypto.randomBytes(32)).toString("base64")

note.example: Note to all: notes are public
note.description: Optional public note to attach to transaction

approvalProgram.description: The program to execute for all OnCompletes

clearProgram.description: The program to execute for ClearState OnComplete

globalByteSlices.description: The maximum number of global byte slices

globalInts.description: The maximum number of global ints

localByteSlices.description: The maximum number of local byte slices

localInts.description: The maximum number of local ints

foreignAssets.description: The asset to be passed to the app

foreignApps.description: Lists the applications in addition to the application-id whose global states may be accessed by this application's approval-program and clear-state-program. The access is read-only.

args.description: The arguments to be passed to the app as a JSON object

foreignAccounts.description: List of accounts in addition to the sender that may be accessed from the application's approval-program and clear-state-program.

boxes.description: The boxes that should be made available for the runtime of the program.

onComplete.description: An application transaction must indicate the action to be taken following the execution of its approvalProgram or clearStateProgram.

fee.description: The fee to be paid for the transaction. Fee should be in microAlgos.

fromUserId.description: The id of the User that is transferring Algos

lease.description: Optional 32-byte base64-encoded lease to prevent replay and conflicting transactions. Use a fixed value to ensure exclusivity. Generate with: Buffer.from(crypto.randomBytes(32)).toString("base64")

note.example: Note to all: notes are public
note.description: Optional public note to attach to transaction

transaction_id.description: The transaction id of the transfer

group_id.description: The group id of the transaction
